name: The Cyclone
description:
Suit Hammers (Str)

Alignment chaotic evil

The Cyclone represents tumultuous evil plots. As long as it is invested, The Cyclone bolsters you with helpful winds that grant you a +2 item bonus to Athletics checks made to , , , and . This increases to a +3 item bonus if you are at least 17th level.

Activate 2 envision, Interact

Frequency once per day

Effect You cast . You do not treat the squares in the whirlwind as difficult terrain, but all other creatures do. The rank of the spell is one-half your level, rounded down (minimum 8th rank), and the save DC is your class DC or spell DC ().
